meta.title: What is FIT? - Fly Infinity Token
meta.description: Learn what Fly Infinity Token (FIT) is and why you should have it

whatisfit.title: What is FIT? Why Should You Have It?
whatisfit.introTitle: The Digital Asset That Never Goes Down
whatisfit.introText1: Imagine a digital asset that never decreases in value. Not 'maybe' — mathematically guaranteed. That's exactly what Fly Infinity Token (FIT) is. The world's first non-diminishing, always-rising digital asset.
whatisfit.introSimple: FIT is a digital currency that only goes up. Unlike Bitcoin or Ethereum that can crash 50% or more, FIT is built on a smart contract that mathematically ensures its price never decreases. Every buy and every sell — yes, even sells — makes the price go up.
whatisfit.whatIsText1: FIT (Fly Infinity Token) is a decentralized digital asset built on the BNB Smart Chain. But unlike any cryptocurrency you've seen before, FIT is backed by real DAI — a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar.
whatisfit.whatIsText2: This means every single transaction — whether you're buying or selling — increases the price.
whatisfit.featureBuyDesc: DAI enters the contract → Reserve grows → Price increases
whatisfit.featureSellDesc: Tokens are burned → Supply decreases → Price increases
whatisfit.featureFeeDesc: 3% buy / 6% sell fees return to the reserve → Price increases
whatisfit.featureDAODesc: All decisions made by the community, not a central team
whatisfit.whyBuyBottom: FIT is not a speculative gamble. It's a mathematical certainty. While others hope their crypto goes up, FIT holders know it will. Every single transaction — buy or sell — increases the value.
whatisfit.diff1Desc: The price NEVER goes down. This is not a promise — it's a mathematical guarantee built into the smart contract.
whatisfit.diff2Desc: Every FIT token is backed by real DAI in the contract. You can verify the reserve at any time.
whatisfit.diff3Desc: Step-based purchase limits prevent whales from dumping or manipulating the price.
whatisfit.diff4Desc: All decisions are made through DAO voting. No central authority can change the rules.
whatisfit.diff5Desc: Both buying AND selling increase the price. Even if you sell, you're helping the ecosystem grow.
whatisfit.diff6Desc: Active participants earn $5 gift rewards through the automated lottery system.
whatisfit.whyHaveSub: A Better Way to Store Value
whatisfit.whyHaveText1: FIT solves the biggest problem in crypto: volatility. Bitcoin can drop 20% in a day. Ethereum can crash 50% in a week. But FIT never drops. It's a mathematical certainty.
whatisfit.whyHaveAnalogy: Most cryptocurrencies are like a roller coaster — up, down, up, down. FIT is like an elevator — it only goes up. Once you're in, you're always rising.
whatisfit.step3Desc: Participate in the ecosystem and earn
whatisfit.step4Desc: Your investment increases with every transaction
whatisfit.numbersPoint: FIT started at $1.00 and has grown to over $6.40 — and it never went down. Not once. Every single day, the price has been higher than the day before.
whatisfit.ctaText: Join the world's first non-diminishing digital asset. Start your journey to infinite growth today.
whatisfit.ctaNote: 🔒 100% decentralized • 💎 Backed by real DAI • 📈 Always rising

footer.tagline: Fly Infinity — Decentralized. Transparent. Forever Rising.
